attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT TMP.INTERFACE_HEADER_ID,
TMP.DELIVERY_ID,
TMP.ORDER_NUMBER,
TMP.ORDER_RELEASE_NAME,
TMP.ORDER_TYPE,
TMP.SHIP_SET_NUMBER,
TMP.PROMISE_DATE,
TMP.REQUEST_DATE,
TMP.PARTIAL_SHIPMENTS_ALLOWED,
TMP.CUST_PO_NUMBER,
TMP.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_NUMBER,
TMP.TRANSACTIONAL_CURR_CODE,
TMP.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_NUMBER,
TMP.SHIP_TO_CUST_NAME,
TMP.SHIP_TO_LOCATION,
TMP.LOCATION,
TMP.SHIP_TO_ADDRESS,
TMP.SHIP_TO_CITY,
TMP.SHIP_TO_PROVINCE,
TMP.SHIP_TO_PROVINCE_CODE,
TMP.SHIP_TO_POSTAL_CODE,
TMP.SHIP_TO_COUNTRY,
TMP.SHIP_FROM_LOCATION,
TMP.AGE,
TMP.BIZ_ENTITY,
TMP.CCA_FPM_CODE,
TMP.COLLECT_ACCOUNT,
TMP.CS_TEAM,
TMP.CSR,
TMP.EARLY_ACCEPTANCE_DATE,
TMP.FCD_DATE,
TMP.FOB_CODE,
TMP.NAMED_PLACE,
TMP.OCP_PADDING,
TMP.ORGANIZATION_CODE,
TMP.SERVICE_LEVEL,
TMP.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,
TMP.SHIPPING_PREFERENCE,
TMP.SLC_SHIP_DATE,
TMP.SS_COST_USD,
TMP.SS_AMOUNT_USD,
TMP.DUTY_ATTRIBUTE,
TMP.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_NUMBER,
TMP.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_NAME,
TMP.IN_REPORT,
TMP.ORDER_INTERFACE_ATTR33,
TMP.OTM_DOMAIN_NAME,
TMP.OTM_TRANSMISSION_NO,
TMP.OTM_TRANSMISSION_STATUS,
TMP.TRANSMISSION_ERROR_MESSAGE,
TMP.OTM_INTERFACE_STATUS,
TMP.ERROR_CODE,
TMP.ERROR_DESCRIPTION,
TMP.RETRY_COUNT,
TMP.SHIP_METHOD,
TMP.PLANNING_STATUS,
TMP.INCO_TERMS,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE1,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE2,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE3,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE4,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE5,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE6,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE7,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE8,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE9,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE10,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE11,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE12,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE13,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE14,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE15,
TMP.CREATED_BY,
TMP.CREATION_DATE,
TMP.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
TMP.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
TMP.PROGRAM_ID,
TMP.REQUEST_ID,
TMP.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN,
TMP.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID,
TMP.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,
TMP.CUST_ACCOUNT_ID,
TMP.LOCATION_ID,
TMP.NO_CARTONS,
TMP.EFFECTIVE_PROMISE_DATE,
TMP.HTS_MISSING,
TMP.VT_CHECK_STATUS,
TMP.PICK_RELEASE_STATUS,
TMP.STATUS_3B18,
'CG' AS GLOBAL_NAME,
SOURCE_DML_TYPE,
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
REFRESH_DATETIME
FROM
 (SELECT INTERFACE_HEADER_ID	,
DELIVERY_ID	,
ORDER_NUMBER	,
ORDER_RELEASE_NAME	,
ORDER_TYPE	,
SHIP_SET_NUMBER	,
PROMISE_DATE	,
REQUEST_DATE	,
PARTIAL_SHIPMENTS_ALLOWED	,
CUST_PO_NUMBER	,
BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_NUMBER	,
TRANSACTIONAL_CURR_CODE	,
SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_NUMBER	,
SHIP_TO_CUST_NAME	,
SHIP_TO_LOCATION	,
LOCATION	,
SHIP_TO_ADDRESS	,
SHIP_TO_CITY	,
SHIP_TO_PROVINCE	,
SHIP_TO_PROVINCE_CODE	,
SHIP_TO_POSTAL_CODE	,
SHIP_TO_COUNTRY	,
SHIP_FROM_LOCATION	,
AGE	,
BIZ_ENTITY	,
CCA_FPM_CODE	,
COLLECT_ACCOUNT	,
CS_TEAM	,
CSR	,
EARLY_ACCEPTANCE_DATE	,
FCD_DATE	,
FOB_CODE	,
NAMED_PLACE	,
OCP_PADDING	,
ORGANIZATION_CODE	,
SERVICE_LEVEL	,
SALES_CHANNEL_CODE	,
SHIPPING_PREFERENCE	,
SLC_SHIP_DATE	,
SS_COST_USD	,
SS_AMOUNT_USD	,
DUTY_ATTRIBUTE	,
SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_NUMBER	,
SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_NAME	,
IN_REPORT	,
ORDER_INTERFACE_ATTR33	,
OTM_DOMAIN_NAME	,
OTM_TRANSMISSION_NO	,
OTM_TRANSMISSION_STATUS	,
TRANSMISSION_ERROR_MESSAGE	,
OTM_INTERFACE_STATUS	,
ERROR_CODE	,
ERROR_DESCRIPTION	,
RETRY_COUNT	,
SHIP_METHOD	,
PLANNING_STATUS	,
INCO_TERMS	,
ATTRIBUTE1	,
ATTRIBUTE2	,
ATTRIBUTE3	,
ATTRIBUTE4	,
ATTRIBUTE5	,
ATTRIBUTE6	,
ATTRIBUTE7	,
ATTRIBUTE8	,
ATTRIBUTE9	,
ATTRIBUTE10	,
ATTRIBUTE11	,
ATTRIBUTE12	,
ATTRIBUTE13	,
ATTRIBUTE14	,
ATTRIBUTE15	,
CREATED_BY	,
CREATION_DATE	,
LAST_UPDATED_BY	,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE	,
PROGRAM_ID	,
REQUEST_ID	,
LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN	,
PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID	,
PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE	,
ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY	,
CUST_ACCOUNT_ID	,
LOCATION_ID	,
NO_CARTONS	,
EFFECTIVE_PROMISE_DATE	,
HTS_MISSING	,
VT_CHECK_STATUS	,
PICK_RELEASE_STATUS	,
STATUS_3B18	,
SOURCE_DML_TYPE,
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
REFRESH_DATETIME
FROM $$NRTACCUMVWDB.CG1_XXSCM_DV_DLVEXT_HDR_STG
WHERE  SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME > '$$LastExtractDate' 
AND SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <=  '$$EndLastExtractDate'
AND SOURCE_DML_TYPE<>'DELETE') TMP 
QUALIFY RANK () OVER (PARTITION BY TMP.INTERFACE_HEADER_ID ORDER BY TMP.INTERFACE_HEADER_ID, TMP.REFRESH_DATETIME DESC ) = 1
